diazepam: Benzodiazepine – increased risk of sedation, falls, and cognitive impairment
amitriptyline: Tricyclic antidepressant – anticholinergic and sedating; avoid in older adults
omeprazole: PPI — avoid long-term scheduled use (>8 weeks) unless indicated
digoxin: Digoxin – avoid as first-line; dose caution in older adults
warfarin: Warfarin – monitor closely; DOACs often preferred
